MAP.COMMENT: --- Set Flag for Future Period creation ---

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: --Evaluate the formula and set the Targetmet value --

MAP.NAME: true
MAP.COMMENT: -- Set Target Met & IsPostLimitsCalculation to true --

BRANCH.COMMENT: --- Check if Actual Value is greater than targetValue ---
--- Check if Actual Value is greater than targetValue ---

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- VE-1355 added EventDate and mapped challengeCode,VE-1376 - mapped new parameter challengePeriodId---

MAP.NAME: true
MAP.COMMENT: if met update status to COMPLETEDINTIME

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: if not met update status to COMPLETEDINTIMENODEPENDENCY

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: dependency not exist, period status will be COMPLETEDINTIME

MAP.NAME: %completeEffectiveDate%>%challengePeriods/monitoringEndDate%
MAP.COMMENT: period status will be COMPLETEDOUTOFTIME if date is not withing monitoringEndDate

BRANCH.COMMENT: VE-1017 (moved existing code inside new branch condition

Values.value: period status updated as %periodStatus% for period id %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

MAP.COMMENT: period status will be NOTACHIEVED if completeFlag is false

Values.value: period status updated as %periodStatus% for period id %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId%

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

BRANCH.COMMENT: check period status and issue awards

SEQUENCE.NAME: %periodStatus%=='COMPLETEDINTIME'
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: issue awards for COMPLETEDINTIME period status

INVOKE.COMMENT: -- Update Challenge Id Details in Social Interaction Member --

Values.value: evaluationAgainstTarget in progress, proceeding to check for future period creation value if %futurePeriodCreationRequired%

BRANCH.COMMENT: -- Create Future periods if period is Completed and postimitCalc is false -- VE-1195 --

Values.value: Published data to create the feature challenge periods for challengeId - %challengePeriods[0]/challengeId%
futurePeriodCreationRequired is %futurePeriodCreationRequired% && postlimitCalc is %IsPostLimitsCalculation%. No Future periods created.

INVOKE.COMMENT: log the message that status update to COMPLETEDINTIME did not happen

Values.value: COMPLETED status not updated for period %challengePeriods/challengePeriodId% because either target was not met or the status of period was already COMPLETED or cancelled. Also IsPostLimitsCalculation is %IsPostLimitsCalculation%
